overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a nighttime walk through Night City's Japanese-inspired district. The player traverses neon-lit streets, crosses intersections, and approaches a street food vendor, featuring futuristic architecture, holographic advertisements, and wet reflective surfaces.

scene_state.functional_zone: futuristic multi-lane street with elevated highway

events.description: begins walking forward from the crosswalk into the street
yellow taxi and other vehicles pass by on the multi-lane road

agents.ego_description: walking along the right side of a wet multi-lane street beneath an elevated highway

notable_agents.action: yellow taxi with headlights on approaching from the distance
person in red cap walking along the sidewalk railing

entered.detail: large curved concrete overpass spanning the street with support pillars
tall holographic advertisements with bright cyan and pink colors
multi-story residential blocks with illuminated windows and external piping
yellow and white striped pedestrian crossing lines on wet asphalt

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a wet futuristic street at night, with the camera walking forward beneath a massive elevated highway overpass. Neon billboards glow in the distance while a yellow taxi approaches. The street is relatively sparse with pedestrians, and the atmosphere is hazy with reflective wet pavement.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered pedestrian arcade with gaming machines

events.description: turns right at intersection and crosses onto the sidewalk
enters a covered walkway with arcade machines visible inside

agents.ego_description: crossing the street and entering a covered pedestrian area with arcade machines

notable_agents.action: group of pedestrians walking along the sidewalk near the corner

entered.detail: vintage blue sedan parked at the curb with chrome details
blue and white retro-style gaming cabinet with illuminated screen
overhead concrete structure providing shelter from weather
dark green classic car driving past on the street

segments.scene_description: The camera turns right at the intersection, crossing the street past a blue parked car and entering a covered walkway. Briefly, an arcade machine is visible inside the entrance. The lighting shifts to a mix of neon and artificial sources as the scene becomes more enclosed.

scene_state.functional_zone: neon-lit commercial sidewalk with Japanese food stalls

events.description: exits covered arcade back to open sidewalk with food stalls
passes by a woman in neon green shorts and continues walking

agents.ego_description: walking along the sidewalk past various neon signs and street vendors

notable_agents.action: woman wearing neon green shorts and 'nicola' shirt walking past the camera

entered.detail: traditional Japanese-style red lanterns hanging outside food stalls
large floating advertisement with bright pink and blue graphics
tall palm trees lining the street in the distance
illuminated shop windows showing mannequins and merchandise

segments.scene_description: Walking along a vibrant commercial sidewalk lined with red paper lanterns and neon signs. The street features holographic billboards and palm trees in the distance. Various pedestrians walk by, including a woman in distinctive neon clothing. The atmosphere is dense with cyberpunk aesthetic and wet reflective surfaces.

scene_state.functional_zone: street food vendor stall with open kitchen

events.description: slows down and stops at the food stall counter
vendor inside the stall looks up and interacts with the camera

agents.ego_description: stopping at a food stall and approaching the vendor window to observe the cooking area

notable_agents.action: food vendor wearing tank top and cap cooking inside the stall
man in tank top drinking from a cup at the stall counter

entered.detail: metal counter with condiments and serving area under green neon lighting
grill surfaces and cooking utensils visible inside the stall kitchen
illuminated sign displaying food items above the stall

segments.scene_description: The camera slows and stops at a street food vendor stall, focusing on the cooking area where a vendor prepares food behind a counter. The space is narrow and enclosed with warm interior lighting contrasting the cool neon outside. A customer stands drinking nearby while steam rises from the cooking equipment.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey from a wide, hazy urban thoroughfare into the intimate, warm glow of a street food stall. It begins by moving forward along a wet futuristic street beneath a massive elevated highway overpass, where neon billboards shimmer through the haze and a yellow taxi approaches. As the camera turns right at an intersection, it passes a parked blue car and enters a covered walkway, shifting the lighting from open city air to a more enclosed mix of artificial neon. The scene then expands onto a vibrant commercial sidewalk lined with red paper lanterns and holographic billboards, weaving past pedestrians and palm trees amidst reflective surfaces. Finally, the camera slows to a halt at a narrow food vendor stall, where the cool exterior neon gives way to warm interior lighting and rising steam from the cooking equipment.
